channels.name: Donghua Decoded
channels.bio: We don't just show donghua — we explain it. Deep takes on cultivation anime, characters & power systems. Commentary that actually says something.

channels.name: Qi & Swords
channels.bio: Cultivation anime, but make it ACTION. Best fights, power scaling & glow-ups in donghua & xianxia. Who wins? You decide in the comments.

channels.name: Donghua Realm
channels.bio: Your home for the best Chinese anime. Daily donghua & xianxia breakdowns, edits, and takes. New Reel every day. Follow if cultivation > everything.

channels.name: Xianxia Daily
channels.bio: Daily xianxia & cultivation anime — news, scenes, and hot takes in 60 seconds. Han Li, Xiao Yan, Ye Fan & more. Tap follow, level up daily.

channels.name: Cultivation Chronicles
channels.bio: The stories behind the strongest. Lore, world-building & character arcs from your favorite donghua & xianxia. For fans who love the deep cut.

channels.name: Immortal Path
channels.bio: Following the journey from mortal to immortal. Character deep-dives on Han Li, Wang Lin, Shi Hao & the rest. The grind never stops.

channels.name: The Dao of Donghua
channels.bio: New to Chinese anime? Start here. Beginner-friendly guides, rankings & where-to-start for every cultivation series. No spoilers, just the way in.

channels.name: Heavenly Donghua
channels.bio: The most beautiful frames in Chinese animation. Cinematic donghua & xianxia edits. If it looks like a painting, it's here.

channels.name: Quiet Life Stories
channels.bio: Short heartwarming stories with a lesson. One quiet tale a day to reset your evening.
